policy.rule: record failed primary attempts and evidence-eligible successful-but-short daily_1y observations for fair retry rotation; sparse, stale, tiny, or discontinuous successful series keep the 48-hour fail-closed retry path; error failures use the threshold, eligible successful short histories cool down immediately until next_attempt_after_utc
